title: Yiyi Demo Localization Copy QA + Terminology Lock

terminology.usage: Use for Yiyi's role in the guided commercial demo.

terminology.zh: Agent 管理式 AI 任务总控台
terminology.usage: Use for the product category; do not reduce it to a normal chatbot.
Use for demo flow; do not call it production execution.
Use when describing mock, preview, and no-provider-call states.
Use for trust-building local evidence review.

safeCopyRules: Say guided demo or dry-run preview when describing the current showcase.
Say real provider testing requires Phase384 authorization.
Say no secret values are displayed.
Say no deployment, release, billing, invoice, or production GA was performed.
